BackstoryDef.title: laborer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a common laborer in a city state.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] hauled items and worked machines as directed by the senior staff. The endless, unrewarding work broke their spirit.

BackstoryDef.title: factory worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] did menial, unskilled work in an industrial factory.

BackstoryDef.title: businessman
BackstoryDef.description: In the city states, most suffer. But someone has to run the corporations.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef] learned the skills of the trade - greasing palms and technical analysis. [PAWN_pronoun] is a sociointellectual machine.

BackstoryDef.title: civil servant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a low-ranking administrator for a moribund government bureaucracy. [PAWN_pronoun] is most at home filling out complicated paperwork and playing office politics.

BackstoryDef.title: engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a construction engineer. [PAWN_pronoun] lead a team which built everything from frontier outposts to cathedrals.\n\n[PAWN_possessive] busy job and numerous nearby fast-food outlets meant [PAWN_pronoun] never cooked for [PAWN_objective]self.

BackstoryDef.title: doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] graduted from a medical school sponsored by the government of a city state and became a combat medic. Tending to wounded soldiers was difficult, but [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in [PAWN_possessive] ability to save lives.

BackstoryDef.title: livestock farmer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked at a livestock farm. [PAWN_pronoun] analyzed animal genetics, feed types, birth and slaughter methods, and price trends to optimize the raising of huge animal herds.

BackstoryDef.title: crop farmer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked at a crop farm. [PAWN_pronoun] analyzed soil, agricultural equipment, weather patterns, and price trends to optimize the planting and harvesting of massive crop fields.

BackstoryDef.title: merchant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was adopted into a line of merchants and took over the family business when [PAWN_possessive] parents passed away.\n\nThe luxurious lifestyle that came with [PAWN_possessive] field of work left [PAWN_nameDef] spoilt and entitled.

BackstoryDef.title: city settler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a settler on a newly-formed city state.\n\nSuch a life requires a jack-of-all trades at basic hands-on tasks.

BackstoryDef.title: immigrant
BackstoryDef.description: Life as a subsistence farmer was difficult and often left [PAWN_nameDef]'s kin starving. Tired of the hardships, [PAWN_nameDef] packed [PAWN_possessive] bags and sought a better life in a big city state.

BackstoryDef.title: househusband
BackstoryDef.description: As an adult, [PAWN_nameDef] kept house and cared for [PAWN_possessive] children while [PAWN_possessive] spouse worked.

BackstoryDef.title: teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was educated in the liberal arts and taught at a public school sponsored by the government of a city state. [PAWN_pronoun] was widely knowledgeable and well-liked by [PAWN_possessive] students.

BackstoryDef.title: bartender
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a bartender in a seedy establishment. The job was one part drink-mixing, one part diplomacy, and one part head-bashing.
